_instructions: Populate each morning with active positions. kill_signals are checked every minute against live METAR obs.

_kill_signal_types.precip: Present weather contains RA, SHRA, TSRA, SN etc — precipitation detected
_kill_signal_types.temp_drop: Temperature drops more than N degrees from daily peak before cutoff_hour local time
_kill_signal_types.wind_shift: Wind direction shifts to specified quadrant (e.g. 'NNE' post-frontal cold advection)
_kill_signal_types.temp_above: Temperature rises above threshold — position is out of range high side
_kill_signal_types.temp_below: Temperature falls below threshold — position is out of range low side
